---
title: "Data Analysis Replication"
author: "Prabhani Athukorala"
format: html
editor: visual
---

# Introduction

```{r}
1 + 1
```

# Original Study Overview

```{r}
#| echo: false
2 * 2
```

## 1) Goal of the original paper

## 2) Data Used in the Original Study

## 3) Analyses Conducted in the Original Study

## 4) Analyses Chosen for Replication

# Data and File Organization

## 1) Repository Structure

## 2) Data Files

## 3) Images from the Original Paper

# Variable Dictionary

# Data Import and Initial Inspection

# Replication Analysis 1: Descriptive Statistics

# Replication Analysis 2: Inferential Analysis

# Replication Analysis 3: Visualization

# Replication Analysis 4: Second Inferential Analysis

# Comparison to the Original Paper

# Discussion and Reflection

# References
